subject: Fermi GBM trigger 472166503/151218890 is not a GRB
body:
P. Jenke (UAH) reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 472166503/151218890
at 21:21:39.46 UT on 18 December 2015, tentatively classified as a GRB,
is in fact not due to a GRB.

This was an accidental trigger."
